Franchise.notFoundBody: This franchise storefront doesn’t exist or is no longer available.

MyFranchise.title: My Franchise
MyFranchise.subtitle: Run your own storefront under this marketplace.
MyFranchise.loginRequired: Log in to create or manage your franchise.
MyFranchise.becomePartnerBody: Open your own franchise storefront and resell this marketplace's approved content under your own brand.
MyFranchise.commissionDisclosure: You earn a {percent} commission on each sale, taken from the marketplace's share — the buyer's price never changes. This rate is locked in when you create your franchise.
MyFranchise.acceptTerms: I accept the franchise terms, including the commission shown above.
MyFranchise.imagesHint: PNG, JPG or WebP. Logo up to 2 MB, cover up to 6 MB.
MyFranchise.imagesAfterCreate: You'll be able to upload a logo and cover image after creating your franchise.
MyFranchise.unavailableGeneric: Franchises are not available on this storefront right now.
MyFranchise.unavailableNotEnabled: This marketplace doesn't offer franchises yet.
MyFranchise.unavailablePaused: New franchise sign-ups are paused right now. Please check back later.
MyFranchise.unavailableBanned: You can't create a franchise on this marketplace.

errors.franchises_paused: New franchise sign-ups are paused right now.
errors.user_banned: You can't create a franchise on this marketplace.
errors.slug_format: Use 3–30 lowercase letters, numbers or hyphens.
errors.slug_taken: That storefront address is already taken.
errors.wallet_format: Enter a valid Stellar public key (starts with G).
errors.image_type: Use a PNG, JPG or WebP image.
errors.image_key: Couldn't attach that image. Please try again.
errors.wallet_not_activated: This wallet is not yet active on the Stellar network. Send at least 1 XLM to this address to activate it.

TenantNotFound.title: This tenant doesn’t exist
TenantNotFound.body: The subdomain you are trying to reach does not match any active marketplace on EarnLumens.

Sanctions.intro: EarnLumens uses a 3-strike system inspired by the largest video platforms. Every infraction is reviewed by a human moderator before a strike is recorded.
Sanctions.severeNote: Severe violations (fraud, harm to minors, deepfakes, doxxing) skip the ladder and result in an immediate permanent ban.

warning.title: Warning
warning.body: First minor infraction. The content is removed but your account is not blocked. You stay logged in.

strike1.title: First strike — 7-day block
strike1.body: Login is blocked for 7 days. The account auto-unbans when the timer expires; the strike stays on record.

strike2.title: Second strike — 30-day block
strike2.body: A second strike within the same record extends the block to 30 days.

strike3.title: Third strike — permanent ban
strike3.body: A third strike permanently bans the account. Permanent bans can only be lifted by a moderator after appeal.

yourStanding.warningTitle: You have {count} active strike on file. | You have {count} active strikes on file.
yourStanding.warningBody: Your next infraction will {next}. Strikes do not expire automatically — they stay on your record until a moderator clears them.

Banned.title: Your account is currently banned
Banned.subtitle: Sign-in is blocked because of a moderator action on your account.
Banned.appealBody: If you believe this decision was wrong, you can request a manual review from the tenant moderation team via the contact channels listed in the Content Guidelines.

ContentLanguagePreferences.title: Content languages
ContentLanguagePreferences.subtitle: Choose which languages you want to see in your feed. The moderation system tags every upload with its real language.
ContentLanguagePreferences.showAllHint: Discovery mode — your feed shows content in every language. Turn off to apply your preferences below.
ContentLanguagePreferences.yourLanguagesHint: Pick the languages you understand. Your feed will only show content in these languages.
ContentLanguagePreferences.includeMultiHint: Content with no dominant language: instrumental music, abstract images/art, or material that mixes several languages roughly evenly. Recommended.
ContentLanguagePreferences.warnEmpty: With no languages selected and language-free content disabled your feed would be empty. Pick at least one language or enable language-free content.
ContentLanguagePreferences.gridChipTooltip: This grid is filtered by content language. Click to change.
ContentLanguagePreferences.emptyByLanguageText: This grid is filtered by your content-language preferences. Try adding more languages or enable “Show all languages”.

Common.loginAcceptTerms: By signing in, you agree to our {terms} and {privacy}.
Common.loginErrorDescription: There was a problem trying to sign in. Please try again.
Common.downloadSafetyNote: This file passed an automated malware scan. Even so, only open files from creators you trust.
Common.creator: Creator
Common.shortAbout: Platform to launch your content marketplace on Stellar.
Common.blockquote: Start in the main financial education tenant and activate your blue credential to create your own tenant, publish content, and earn in XLM.
Common.imageNotFoundDescription: The image you're looking for doesn't exist or has been removed.
Common.entryNotFoundDescription: The entry you're looking for doesn't exist or has been removed.
Common.collectionNotFoundDescription: The collection you're looking for doesn't exist or has been removed.
Common.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.

CxDeposit.snackbarError: Error copying address to clipboard. Try again or copy manually.
CxDeposit.snackbarErrorDetails: Error copying address to clipboard. Details in browser console. Try again or copy manually.
CxDeposit.snackbarNotSupported: Copying to clipboard is not supported in this browser. Please copy the address manually.

Wallet.unfundedMessage: This wallet is not yet active on the Stellar network. Send at least 1 XLM to this address to activate it.

Account.syncHint: To update your profile info, log out and sign in again.
Account.creatorStudioHint: Manage your content, track performance & upload new material
Account.viewPublicProfileHint: See how others view your profile
Account.termsAndConditionsHint: Review our terms of service and privacy policy
Account.contentGuidelinesHint: Rules for publishing content in the main tenant and future instances
Account.myFranchiseHint: Open and manage your own storefront under this marketplace
Account.badgeNone: You don't have an active blue credential yet
Account.badgeNoneHint: Activate your blue credential to request tenant creation and access advanced tools.

Verification.title: Activate your blue credential to create tenants
Verification.launchStore: Create and launch your own tenant
Verification.verifiedBadge: Blue credential verified on your profile
Verification.postCommunity: Publish and moderate your own community
Verification.storeAnalytics: Advanced analytics to scale your tenant
Verification.claimSubtitle: Your blue credential activates instantly and enables tenant creation.
Verification.claimIrreversible: This action is final. Once activated, your credential cannot be revoked, transferred, or restarted before its expiration date.
Verification.claimConfirm: I understand this action is final and cannot be undone.
Verification.claimSuccessMessage: Your blue credential is active. You can now continue with your tenant creation request.
Verification.alreadyClaimedTitle: You already have an active blue credential
Verification.alreadyClaimedMessage: You already have an active blue credential to manage your access to the tenant system.
Verification.claimError: We couldn't activate your badge right now. Please try again in a moment.

WaitList.enterEmailMessage: Activate your blue credential and enter your email to receive updates about your tenant enablement.
WaitList.registeredEmailWeWillKeepYouInformed: Done! Your blue credential is now active. We will email you updates about tenant enablement.
WaitList.title: Activate your blue credential
WaitList.alreadyJoinedMessage: You already have an active blue credential. We will notify you when your tenant is enabled to publish and sell content.
WaitList.stepNotify: Email notification when your tenant is enabled

errors.noFullAsset: Please upload the full content file before submitting.
errors.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

Upload.leaveWarning: An upload is in progress. If you leave now it will be cancelled. Leave anyway?

success.title: Upload Complete!

success.reviewMessage: Your {type} has been submitted for review. You'll be notified once it's approved.

Preview.payWithXAccountBalance: Pay with your X account balance
Preview.connectWalletError: Please connect your wallet to continue
Preview.noWalletAddress: No wallet address found. Please reconnect your wallet.
Preview.transactionExpiredMessage: This payment session has expired. The exchange rate may have changed. Please try again to get an updated quote.
Preview.walletNotActivated: Your wallet is not yet active on the Stellar network. Send at least 1 XLM to activate it before making a purchase.
Preview.contentWalletInactive: This content can't be purchased right now: one of its payout wallets is no longer active on the Stellar network. Please try again later.
Preview.paymentInProgress: Your previous payment is still being confirmed on the Stellar network. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
Preview.walletAccountMismatch: The wallet signed with a different account than the one selected. Switch to the selected account in your wallet and try again.
Preview.walletReconnectRequired: Your wallet session has expired or is unavailable. Please reconnect your wallet and try again.
Preview.franchiseSelfPurchase: Franchise owners can't buy through their own franchise. Please purchase from the main store instead.
Preview.confirmingPayment: Confirming your payment on the Stellar network… This usually takes a few seconds.
Preview.paymentConfirmTimeout: We couldn't confirm your payment yet. If it went through, your content will unlock automatically within a few minutes.
